intro.slide1Body: A safe, anonymous marketplace for Mauritania. Buy and sell without sharing your identity.
intro.slide2Body: Explore listings any time — no account needed just to look around.
intro.slide3Body: Create an account to post a listing. An admin reviews each one before it goes live.
intro.slide4Body: All contact goes through the admin, so your phone number stays private. Create your account to get started.

menu.supportMessage: Hello, I need help with Teyvay.

about.whatBody: Teyvay is a secure, anonymous marketplace where users post and browse listings without revealing their identity.
about.step1Body: Register with your phone number and create your protected account.
about.step2Body: Publish your product; an admin reviews it before it goes live.
about.step3Body: Buyers contact the admin only, to keep everyone safe.
about.step4Body: The deal is completed under full admin supervision.
about.rule1: Posting phone numbers or personal contact info is not allowed.
about.rule2: Misleading ads or illegal products are not allowed.
about.rule3: All transactions happen only through the platform admin.
about.rule4: Admins may remove any violating content without notice.
about.privacyBody: All personal data (phone, WhatsApp, name) is completely hidden from users. Only admins can view it.

support.heroSubtitle: All support messages go directly to the admin only.
support.reportMessage: Hello, I'd like to report a problem on Teyvay.
support.faq1Q: How do I post a product?
support.faq1A: Tap “Add product” and fill in the form. The product is reviewed by the admin before it goes live.
support.faq2Q: Can I contact the seller directly?
support.faq2A: No. All communication goes through the admin only, to keep everyone private and safe.
support.faq3Q: How long does the review take?
support.faq3A: Usually within 24 hours. You can track your product's status from the “My products” page.
support.faq4A: The product may contain contact info or break the platform rules. Check the rejection reason on the “My products” page.
